blessings.name: Kick
blessings.description: A strong physical kick. Can be used twice per round.

blessings.name: Bash
blessings.description: A heavy strike (Universal).

blessings.name: Brace
blessings.description: Prepare for impact.

blessings.name: Quick-Step
blessings.description: Move with speed.

blessings.name: Meditate
blessings.description: Regain focus.

blessings.name: Focus
blessings.description: Center your mind (Universal).

blessings.name: Parry
blessings.description: Deflect an attack.

blessings.name: Hardened Skin
blessings.description: Toughen your defense.

blessings.name: Tackle
blessings.description: Knock down an opponent.

blessings.name: Vanguard
blessings.description: A heavy strike that generates Momentum (Light Spark).

blessings.name: Rage
blessings.description: Increases damage but drains Concentration (Dark Spark).

blessings.name: Pummel
blessings.description: A strike that has a chance to Daze (Instinct Spark).

blessings.name: Precision
blessings.description: Increases hit chance for the next 3 rounds (Light Spark).

blessings.name: Backstab
blessings.description: Massive damage if the target is facing away (Dark Spark).

blessings.name: Harpoon
blessings.description: Pulls a distant target into melee range (Instinct Spark).

blessings.name: Sanctify
blessings.description: Creates a zone that reduces incoming damage (Light Spark).

blessings.name: Siphon
blessings.description: Converts a portion of damage dealt into HP (Dark Spark).

blessings.name: Thick Hide
blessings.description: A passive boost to base Armor (Instinct Spark).

blessings.name: Spark
blessings.description: A quick burst of holy light (Light Spark).

blessings.name: Miasma
blessings.description: A cloud that deals damage over time (Dark Spark).

blessings.name: Echo
blessings.description: Repeats the last non-blessing action (Instinct Spark).

blessings.name: Mend
blessings.description: A standard, reliable health restoration (Light Spark).

blessings.name: Curse
blessings.description: Reduces the target's highest attribute (Dark Spark).

blessings.name: Tame
blessings.description: Bind a beast (Instinct Spark).

blessings.name: Bless
blessings.description: Increases the party's Crit Rate (Light Spark).

blessings.name: Jinx
blessings.description: Causes the target's next attack to miss (Dark Spark).

blessings.name: Scavenge
blessings.description: Chance to find extra Favor or items (Instinct Spark).

blessings.name: Bestial Link
blessings.description: Link souls with your pet (Specialization).

blessings.name: Dual-Cast
blessings.description: Mix energies for greater effect.

blessings.name: Transmute
blessings.description: Change the properties of matter (Specialization).

blessings.name: Vault
blessings.description: Leap high into the air (Specialization).

blessings.name: Spirit Bond
blessings.description: Beast Master Ultimate.

blessings.name: Equilibrium
blessings.description: Red Mage Ultimate.

blessings.name: Philosopher's Stone
blessings.description: Alchemist Ultimate.

blessings.name: Dragon Dive
blessings.description: Dragoon Ultimate.

blessings.name: Imbue
blessings.description: Buffs gear with holy energy.

blessings.name: Net Trap
blessings.description: Immobilizes a target.

blessings.name: Death Touch
blessings.description: Instant heavy damage to low HP.

blessings.name: Hunger
blessings.description: Drains enemy stamina/HP over time.

blessings.name: Control Weather
blessings.description: Modifies room environmental tags.

blessings.name: Flame Blanket
blessings.description: Fire-damage shield for the party.

blessings.name: Decoy
blessings.description: Forces NPCs to attack a target-dummy.

blessings.name: Teleport
blessings.description: Instant room-to-room traversal.

blessings.name: Disrupt
blessings.description: Silences enemy blessings.

blessings.name: Ki Power
blessings.description: Boosts Concentration/Momentum.

blessings.name: Tiger Stance
blessings.description: Increases Speed/Crit for a duration.

blessings.name: Poach
blessings.description: Increased favor/item drops on kill.

blessings.name: Shadow Step
blessings.description: Step through the shadows to appear behind a foe.

blessings.name: Backstab
blessings.description: A high damage strike that requires stealth.

blessings.name: Venom Coat
blessings.description: Coat your weapon in vile poison.

blessings.name: Quick Slash
blessings.description: A fast strike. Low cost, reliable damage.

blessings.name: Evasive Step
blessings.description: Drastically increases Dodge chance for a short time.

blessings.name: Poisoned Blade
blessings.description: Strikes and infects the target with a spreading toxin.

blessings.name: Trap Sense
blessings.description: Passive: Reveals hidden dangers in the room.

blessings.name: Crossbow Shot
blessings.description: A ranged attack that ignores some armor.

blessings.name: Crippling Strike
blessings.description: Damages and slows the target, reducing their attack rate.

blessings.name: Shroud of Shadows
blessings.description: Vanish from sight. Next attack deals bonus damage.

blessings.name: Phantom Strike
blessings.description: Teleport to foe and strike, ignoring all Armor.

blessings.name: Fireburst
blessings.description: Blasts a target. Removes Freeze to deal bonus damage.

blessings.name: Glacier Spike
blessings.description: Damages and Slows target. Freezes if target is Shocked.

blessings.name: Chain Lightning
blessings.description: Strikes a target and jumps to another. Bonus dmg if Burning.

blessings.name: Arcane Blink
blessings.description: Teleport to a safer position, gaining high Dodge.

blessings.name: Elemental Catalyst
blessings.description: Triggers the synergy effect of a status without consuming it.

blessings.name: Elemental Surge
blessings.description: Your next spell deals bonus damage and has increased range.

blessings.name: Frost Nova
blessings.description: AoE Cold damage. Freezes enemies if they are Shocked.

blessings.name: Pyroclasm
blessings.description: Heavy AoE Fire damage. Shatters Frozen enemies for extra dmg.

blessings.name: Stormcaller's Fury
blessings.description: Shocks all enemies. Stuns them if they were Frozen.

blessings.name: Elemental Cataclysm
blessings.description: Massive damage. Explodes if targets have status effects.

blessings.name: Trinity of Destruction
blessings.description: Hits target with Fire, Ice, and Lightning simultaneously.

blessings.name: Divine Smite
blessings.description: Strikes a foe with holy power. Heals you slightly on hit.

blessings.name: Holy Shield
blessings.description: Raises a shield of light, increasing Armor.

blessings.name: Lay on Hands
blessings.description: Heals a target and removes one debuff.

blessings.name: Cleansing Wave
blessings.description: Removes debuffs from all allies and heals them.

blessings.name: Holy Strike
blessings.description: A heavy blow that Stuns the target.

blessings.name: Aura of Protection
blessings.description: Reduces incoming damage for the entire party.

blessings.name: Righteous Fury
blessings.description: Greatly increases Damage, but you take more damage.

blessings.name: Judgment
blessings.description: Deals heavy damage and Weakens the target.

blessings.name: Divine Wrath
blessings.description: Smites all enemies and heals all allies.

blessings.name: Heavy Swing
blessings.description: A powerful swing. Ignores some armor.

blessings.name: Endure Pain
blessings.description: Reduces incoming damage and heals slightly.

blessings.name: Battle Cry
blessings.description: Grants damage bonus to self and allies. Weakens enemies.

blessings.name: Berserker Charge
blessings.description: Rushes an enemy, dealing damage and breaking lines.

blessings.name: Reckless Strike
blessings.description: High damage attack, but you take recoil damage.

blessings.name: Titan's Grip
blessings.description: Grabs and throws an enemy, disrupting them.

blessings.name: Cleave
blessings.description: Strikes multiple enemies in a wide arc.

blessings.name: Raging Strikes
blessings.description: Greatly increases damage at the cost of defense.

blessings.name: Warrior's Roar
blessings.description: Stuns all enemies in the room.

blessings.name: Unstoppable Wrath
blessings.description: Massive damage that ignores armor and heals you.

blessings.name: Earthshatter
blessings.description: Slams the ground, damaging and knocking down all enemies.

blessings.name: Ray of Light
blessings.description: A beam of light that ignores some armor.

blessings.name: Protection from Evil
blessings.description: Grants resistance to Dark damage and Fear.

blessings.name: Protection from Good
blessings.description: Grants resistance to Light damage and Charm.

blessings.name: Purify
blessings.description: Removes debuffs, poison, and curses from target.

blessings.name: Cure Light
blessings.description: Heals a target and grants temporary Defense.

blessings.name: Sanctuary
blessings.description: Reduces all damage taken by 50% for a short time.

blessings.name: Holy Smite
blessings.description: Deals heavy damage, double against Undead/Dark.

blessings.name: Holy Aura
blessings.description: Allies gain Attack and Resistance to status effects.

blessings.name: Martyr's Shield
blessings.description: Absorb damage for an ally and reflect it back.

blessings.name: Divine Judgment
blessings.description: Massive AoE damage. Undead take extra damage.

blessings.name: Resurrection
blessings.description: Revives a fallen ally with buffs (Massive Heal).

blessings.name: Shield Bash
blessings.description: Slams a shield into the foe. High knockback chance.

blessings.name: Dirt Kick
blessings.description: Kicks dirt in the enemy's eyes, causing Blindness.

blessings.name: Sword Parry
blessings.description: Reduces incoming melee damage and prepares a counter.

blessings.name: Mounted Charge
blessings.description: A powerful charge that moves through enemies.

blessings.name: Guardian's Oath
blessings.description: Reduces damage taken for self and nearby allies.

blessings.name: Pin Down
blessings.description: Damages and Roots the target, preventing movement.

blessings.name: Knight's Rally
blessings.description: Allies gain damage bonus and healing.

blessings.name: Lance Thrust
blessings.description: Piercing strike that ignores armor. Stuns if mounted.

blessings.name: Bulwark Stance
blessings.description: Immune to knockback and greatly reduces damage.

blessings.name: Unbreakable Charge
blessings.description: Massive charge that pushes enemies and rallies allies.

blessings.name: Banner of Kings
blessings.description: Plants a banner granting massive buffs to the area.

blessings.name: Shield Block
blessings.description: Reduces incoming damage and reflects some back.

blessings.name: Fencing Stance
blessings.description: Parries the next attack and counters with damage.

blessings.name: Brutal Strike
blessings.description: A heavy two-handed strike that knocks back.

blessings.name: Rescue
blessings.description: Intercepts an attack meant for an ally.

blessings.name: Trip
blessings.description: Knocks the target down, weakening them.

blessings.name: Sharpen Weapon
blessings.description: Increases damage and accuracy for a short time.

blessings.name: Grip Mastery
blessings.description: Prevents disarm and boosts weapon damage.

blessings.name: Weapon Cyclone
blessings.description: Spins to hit all adjacent enemies. Can disarm.

blessings.name: Relentless Assault
blessings.description: Unleashes a flurry of attacks on the target.

blessings.name: Executioner's Wrath
blessings.description: Massive damage to controlled targets. Ignores armor.

blessings.name: Flask Toss
blessings.description: Throws a volatile flask dealing Fire or Acid damage.

blessings.name: Reinforce
blessings.description: Strengthens an ally's gear for a short time.

blessings.name: Corrosive Vial
blessings.description: Melts enemy armor, reducing their defense.

blessings.name: Healing Mist
blessings.description: Creates a mist that heals nearby allies.

blessings.name: Smoke Bomb
blessings.description: Obscures an area, causing attacks to miss.

blessings.name: Volatile Reaction
blessings.description: Gain extra actions at the cost of health.

blessings.name: Alchemical Infusion
blessings.description: Imbues an ally's weapon with elemental properties.

blessings.name: Unstable Concoction
blessings.description: A powerful bomb dealing mixed elemental damage.

blessings.name: Reactive Armor
blessings.description: Explodes when hit, damaging and stunning attackers.

blessings.name: Philosopher's Gift
blessings.description: Grants extra potion slots and free flask usage.

blessings.name: Chemical Cataclysm
blessings.description: Detonates all ongoing effects for massive damage.

blessings.name: Eagle Eye
blessings.description: Reveals enemies and players on the map.

blessings.name: Farsight
blessings.description: Projects your mind to map distant areas (cast farsight <dir>).

blessings.name: Track
blessings.description: Find the direction to a target.

blessings.name: Quick Shot
blessings.description: A fast arrow shot at a locked target.

blessings.name: Snipe
blessings.description: A high damage shot that requires a target lock.

blessings.name: Bloodlust
blessings.description: Enter a rage, increasing STR but lowering Defense.

blessings.name: Twin Axes
blessings.description: A rapid double strike.

blessings.name: Reckless Swing
blessings.description: Massive damage at the cost of your own health.

blessings.name: Undying Rage
blessings.description: Refuse to die for a short duration.

blessings.name: Stone Skin
blessings.description: Hardens skin to drastically increase Defense.

blessings.name: Tremor
blessings.description: Shakes the ground under a target. Low damage, high impact.

blessings.name: Earthquake
blessings.description: Massive area damage that knocks down all enemies.

blessings.name: Lightning Storm
blessings.description: Calls down bolts of lightning on all enemies.

blessings.name: Ice Rain
blessings.description: Rains shards of ice. Deals damage and slows enemies.

blessings.name: Double Strike
blessings.description: Two quick strikes. Generates 1 Chi.

blessings.name: Dragon Kick
blessings.description: A powerful kick that consumes 2 Chi for massive damage.

blessings.name: Crane Stance
blessings.description: Enter a defensive stance, increasing Defense and Wisdom.

blessings.name: Raise Dead
blessings.description: Turns a corpse in the room into a skeletal minion.

blessings.name: Bone Spear
blessings.description: Fires a sharp bone projectile at the target.

blessings.name: Howl
blessings.description: Commands your pet to call for reinforcements.

blessings.name: Sunder
blessings.description: Strikes a specific body part to break it.
